task_description: Build an AI Document/Contract Intelligence Agent with 3 extraction modes (local, API, hybrid), enterprise features (contract analysis, invoice processing, compliance checking, PII detection, batch processing), an action engine for automated responses, and a FastAPI REST API layer.

verification.summary: All 35 tests pass. Docker image builds successfully. FastAPI app loads with 23 routes. Two review passes completed with all critical/important issues resolved: industry modules wired into pipeline, CORS fixed, batch async with correct job_id tracking, enum consolidated, upload limits added, file cleanup implemented, and per-module error isolation in industry analysis.
